title: Brexit 10 years later: How the UK economy and politics changed, in charts
title_zh: 英国脱欧十年后：图表中英国经济和政治如何变化
text: Ten years after the Brexit vote, CNBC compiled these charts show how the U.K. has changed across growth, immigration, sterling, trade and politics.
zh: 英国脱欧公投十年后，CNBC 编制了这些图表，展示了英国在增长、移民、英镑、贸易和政治方面的变化。

title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
title_zh: “感觉就像一个医学奇迹”：一张二维码优惠券如何将我 618 美元的沃尔格林处方药减至 15 美元？
text: “This medication was generic.”
zh: “这种药物是通用的。”

title: ‘It seems too good to be true’: At a steak-dinner retirement seminar, the guy said annuities can outperform the market. Is that true?
title_zh: “这似乎好得令人难以置信”：在一次牛排晚餐退休研讨会上，该人表示年金可以跑赢市场。这是真的吗？
text: “He claimed that fixed-rate annuities are the sparkly, rainbow-fairyland of investments.”
zh: “他声称固定利率年金是投资中闪闪发光的彩虹仙境。”

title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
title_zh: 我想把一切都留给我的儿子们，但我害怕他们会把它交给我的前夫。我该如何防止这种情况？
text: “I would not like my money to fall into the hands of my former spouse.”
zh: “我不希望我的钱落入我前配偶的手中。”

title: Beijing is summoning executives again, but here's why that's causing less worry than in 2021 - CNBC

title_zh: “我喜欢他们的钱”：特朗普威胁对美国广播公司（ABC）提起诉讼，因为它报道了《倒影池》
text: The latest action against ABC comes as the broadcaster faces two investigations from the Federal Communications Commission.
zh: 针对美国广播公司的最新行动正值该广播公司面临联邦通信委员会的两项调查之际。

title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
title_zh: “我们完全拥有自己的房子”：我今年 67 岁，收入 10 万美元。我现在领取每年 30,000 美元的社会保障还是等待？
text: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”
zh: “我们在退休计划、Roth IRA 和国债中总共节省了 950,000 美元。”

title: Alphabet’s stock is set to join the Dow. Here’s which company is getting the boot.

zh: 陶氏工业指数提供商称赞 Alphabet 是通信行业“更具代表性”的公司。

title: Cerebras falls 8% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
title_zh: Cerebras 股价下跌 8%，此前芯片制造商在 IPO 以来的首份收益报告中预测利润率将萎缩
text: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.
zh: Cerebras 于 5 月在纳斯达克上市，让华尔街有机会接触一家纯粹的人工智能公司。

title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
title_zh: Alphabet 取代 Verizon 加入道琼斯工业平均指数
text: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.
zh: Alphabet 将取代 Verizon 在道琼斯工业平均指数中的地位。

title: House expected to pass affordable housing bill, send it to Trump's desk
title_zh: 众议院预计将通过经济适用房法案，并将其送到特朗普的办公桌上
text: The House on Tuesday could give final passage to a bill aimed at lowering costs for homebuyers and reining in private equity.
zh: 众议院周二可能最终通过一项旨在降低购房者成本和控制私募股权的法案。

title: Bill Gates testimony on Jeffrey Epstein ties released by House oversight panel
title_zh: 众议院监督小组公布比尔·盖茨关于杰弗里·爱泼斯坦关系的证词
text: "I should never have met with Epstein in the first place," Bill Gates told members of the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.
zh: 比尔·盖茨对众议院监督和政府改革委员会的成员说：“我一开始就不应该会见爱泼斯坦。”

title: CFTC sues Kentucky over actions against prediction markets, making it first red state to face federal scrutiny
title_zh: CFTC 就针对预测市场的行为起诉肯塔基州，使其成为第一个面临联邦审查的红州
text: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.
zh: 该委员会现已起诉九个州，以捍卫其所认为的监管赛事合同的专有权利。

title: Traders are loving this cheap way to make big bets against chip stocks
title_zh: 交易者喜欢这种廉价的方式来做空芯片股
text: Just a day after making new all-time records, the semiconductor sector is down almost 7% and traders are finding a cheap way to bet on a bigger pivot.
zh: 就在创造新的历史记录一天后，半导体行业下跌了近 7%，交易者正在寻找一种廉价的方式来押注更大的支点。

title: An off-grid power project gets a major proof of concept. What it means for GE Vernova
title_zh: 离网电力项目获得了重要的概念验证。这对 GE Vernova 意味着什么
text: AI data centers powered by off-grid power plants took a major step forward this week, a good sign for GE Vernova as industry challenges pile up.
zh: 由离网发电厂供电的人工智能数据中心本周向前迈出了一大步，随着行业挑战的不断增加，这对 GE Vernova 来说是一个好兆头。

title: Cerebras delivers its first earnings report — but it’s not enough to lift the stock
title_zh: Cerebras 发布第一份收益报告，但这不足以提振股价
text: Despite upbeat revenue figures, Cerebras’s stock was falling in after-hours trading.
zh: 尽管营收数据乐观，但 Cerebras 的股价在盘后交易中仍在下跌。

title: SpaceX reveals pricing details for what could be one of the year’s biggest debt deals
title_zh: SpaceX 公布了可能成为今年最大债务交易之一的定价细节
text: The offering is set to close on Friday and help SpaceX pay off its existing debt
zh: 此次发行定于周五结束，帮助 SpaceX 偿还现有债务

title: The No. 1 overall NBA draft pick will make nearly $70 million overnight, as historic TV deals keeping money flowing into NBA
title_zh: NBA 状元秀将一夜赚近 7000 万美元，因为历史性的电视交易让资金源源不断地流入 NBA
text: There’s so much money at stake in the NBA draft that falling a few slots could cost a player $30 million.
zh: NBA 选秀涉及的金钱如此之多，以至于失去几个位置可能会让球员损失 3000 万美元。

title: Paid in company stock? Don’t let your loyalty derail your financial future.
title_zh: 以公司股票支付？不要让您的忠诚度破坏您的财务未来。
text: If your company has a bad quarter, you could potentially see your stock holdings fall and lose your job.
zh: 如果你的公司季度业绩不佳，你可能会看到你的股票下跌并失去工作。

text: China’s Market Revival Hinges on Gloomy Economy Turning Corner Bloomberg.com

title: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years - BeInCrypto
title_zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，但股市20年仍未复苏 - BeInCrypto
text: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years BeInCrypto
zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，但股市20年仍未复苏 BeInCrypto

title: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
title_zh: IPO后不到两周，SpaceX通过发债筹集了250亿美元
text: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.
zh: 消息人士称，在接到价值近 900 亿美元的订单后，SpaceX 通过发债筹集了 250 亿美元。

title: PGA Tour CEO Brian Rolapp unveils sweeping changes to professional golf
title_zh: 美巡赛首席执行官布莱恩·罗拉普 (Brian Rolapp) 公布了职业高尔夫的彻底变革
text: Changes to the PGA Tour are designed to elevate competition and raise payouts for winners.
zh: 美巡赛的变化旨在提升竞争并提高获胜者的奖金。

title: Senate backs Iran war powers resolution as GOP pressure grows on Trump's deal to end war
title_zh: 随着共和党对特朗普结束战争协议的压力加大，参议院支持伊朗战争权力决议
text: Senate Republicans want more details on Trump’s Iran deal as questions swirl around sanctions relief, nuclear restrictions and congressional approval.
zh: 随着围绕解除制裁、核限制和国会批准的问题不断，参议院共和党人希望获得有关特朗普伊朗协议的更多细节。

title: FedEx posts strong earnings results in last quarter with freight business
title_zh: 联邦快递上季度货运业务盈利强劲
text: FedEx posted strong fiscal fourth quarter earnings on Tuesday in the company's last quarter that included the freight business before its spin-off.
zh: 联邦快递周二公布了强劲的第四季度财报，该公司最后一个季度的盈利包括分拆前的货运业务。

title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
title_zh: 预测市场交易员预计，马姆达尼支持的候选人可能会在纽约市初选中获胜
text: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.
zh: 选民们即将前往纽约投票，民主党国会初选的四场激烈角逐成为焦点。

title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
title_zh: SpaceX 看到了卖空者的一些兴趣，但许多人仍然不敢做空马斯克
text: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.
zh: 据 S3 Partners 估计，约有 4000 万股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占公开交易股票的 5% 至 7%。

title: What DuPont's coming 1-for-3 reverse stock split means for investors
title_zh: 杜邦即将进行的 1:3 反向股票分割对投资者意味着什么
text: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.
zh: 每个工作日，投资俱乐部都会发布最后冲刺；下午交易最后一小时的可行更新。

title: Tesla faces federal probe after Model 3 slams into Texas home, killing 76-year-old
title_zh: 特斯拉 Model 3 撞上德克萨斯州民宅，导致 76 岁老人死亡，特斯拉面临联邦调查
text: Harris County authorities said that the driver, Michael Butler, said that he had been using Tesla's partially automated driving systems.
zh: 哈里斯县当局表示，司机迈克尔·巴特勒表示，他一直在使用特斯拉的部分自动驾驶系统。

title: SpaceX stock’s wild price swings since its IPO show how risky leveraged ETFs can be
title_zh: 自 IPO 以来 SpaceX 股票的剧烈价格波动表明杠杆 ETF 的风险有多大
text: The excitement around SpaceX shares has quickly faded after they soared in their market debut this month — providing a crushing reminder of just how risky it is to make leveraged bets on single stocks via the exchange-traded-fund market.
zh: SpaceX 股价在本月首次上市后飙升，围绕该股的兴奋情绪很快就消退了——这令人震惊地提醒人们，通过交易所交易基金市场对单一股票进行杠杆押注的风险有多大。

title: These life-insurance policies are booming. Here’s who should — and shouldn’t — buy one.
title_zh: 这些人寿保险政策正在蓬勃发展。以下是哪些人应该购买，哪些人不应该购买。
text: Indexed universal life insurance policies have a very specific purpose that can help families, if used correctly.
zh: 指数万能人寿保险保单有一个非常具体的目的，如果使用得当，可以帮助家庭。

title: This tech ‘fear gauge’ is nearing a two-decade high. Investors should worry.
title_zh: 这种科技“恐惧指数”已接近二十年来的最高点。投资者应该担心。
text: Wall Street’s main ‘fear gauge,’ the ‘VIX’ might not be the best way to track this volatility in stocks
zh: 华尔街主要的“恐惧指标”“VIX”可能不是追踪股市波动的最佳方式

title: China to back ‘qualified’ foreign firms for listing on domestic markets - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 中国支持“合格”外国公司在国内市场上市 - 《南华早报》
text: China to back ‘qualified’ foreign firms for listing on domestic markets South China Morning Post
zh: 中国支持“合格”外国公司在国内市场上市 《南华早报》

title: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy - CNA
title_zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 - CNA
text: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy CNA
zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 CNA

title: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? - J.P. Morgan Private Bank
title_zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？ - 摩根大通私人银行
text: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? J.P. Morgan Private Bank
zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？摩根大通私人银行

title: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative - South China Morning Post
title_zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 - 南华早报
text: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative South China Morning Post
zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 南华早报

title: Inside Kevin Warsh's selection process for the next Atlanta Fed president
title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 遴选下一任亚特兰大联储主席的过程
text: Choosing a new head for the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta is an opportunity for new Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh to reshape the central bank.
zh: 为亚特兰大联储选择新行长是新任美联储主席凯文·沃什重塑央行的一个机会。

title: Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan to begin for ships stranded in Persian Gulf, maritime organization says
title_zh: 海事组织表示，霍尔木兹海峡计划开始疏散滞留在波斯湾的船只
text: More than 11,000 seafarers stuck in the Persian Gulf will begin to exit through the Hormuz Strait in a large-scale evacuation plan backed by Iran and the U.S.
zh: 在伊朗和美国支持的大规模疏散计划中，滞留在波斯湾的 11,000 多名海员将开始通过霍尔木兹海峡撤离。

title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks are falling in response
title_zh: Meta 正在构建一个预测市场应用程序。这些股票纷纷下跌
text: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction market platform, internally known as "Arena."
zh: 报道称，首席执行官马克·扎克伯格指示员工开发一个预测市场平台，内部称为“Arena”。

title: Here's why we decided to put money to work in Tuesday's market pullback
title_zh: 这就是为什么我们决定在周二的市场回调中投入资金
text: The action on Wall Street looks far more constructive than it appeared at the crack of dawn.
zh: 华尔街的行动看起来比黎明时显得更有建设性。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: The momentum trades of 2026 are breaking with gold, silver and South Korea down big
title_zh: 2026年的势头交易正在被打破，黄金、白银和韩国大幅下跌
text: Each of these assets caught a bid this year as investors nervous about their exposure to U.S. large cap tech sought out different asset classes.
zh: 由于投资者对美国大型科技公司的风险敞口感到紧张，因此这些资产今年都受到了竞购，纷纷寻求不同的资产类别。

title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
title_zh: 去年美国人的 401(k) 余额创下历史新高。看你比较如何。
text: It was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers, according to Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report
zh: 根据先锋集团最新的“美国如何储蓄”报告，对于大多数工作场所退休储蓄者来说，这是非常好的一年

title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
title_zh: 如何在退休后工作而不会看到社会保障支票被削减
text: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.
zh: 在完全退休年龄之前领取福利同时保住工作可能会引发意外的扣缴，但这笔钱不会永远丢失。

title: Your index fund is hiding a looming tech-stock risk — here is how to protect your portfolio
title_zh: 您的指数基金隐藏着迫在眉睫的科技股风险——以下是保护您的投资组合的方法
text: The S&P 500’s top 10 stocks dominate like never before. Here is a better way to invest.
zh: 标准普尔 500 指数前 10 名股票以前所未有的方式占据主导地位。这是一种更好的投资方式。

title: Trump admits selling IBM’s stock was a mistake. Now he’s cheering its quantum future.
title_zh: 特朗普承认出售 IBM 股票是一个错误。现在他正在为它的量子未来欢呼。
text: IBM looks like a focal point as the U.S. further backs domestic quantum-computing initiatives.
zh: 随着美国进一步支持国内量子计算计划，IBM 看起来像是一个焦点。

title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
title_zh: 我的房客在我的桌子上留下了热痕。直到她走了我才注意到他们。我是否要求她付费才能删除它们？
text: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it.”
zh: “让我发疯的是她没有提到这件事。”

title: Are falling tech stocks the start of an overdue selloff — or a well-deserved pause?
title_zh: 科技股下跌是早该抛售的开始，还是理所应当的暂停？
text: After weeks of large-scale alarms that turned out to be false starts, equities finally found a real problem — the one they spent two years celebrating.
zh: 在连续几周的大规模警报最终被证明是错误的开始之后，股市终于发现了一个真正的问题——他们花了两年时间庆祝的问题。

title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
title_zh: 标准普尔表示，六月份工厂裁员接近金融危机和新冠疫情水平
text: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.
zh: 尽管该公司 6 月份的制造业指数好于预期，但主要来自库存重建和大幅裁员。

title: Sen. Cassidy plans to push 'big idea' for Social Security reform in last days in office
title_zh: 参议员卡西迪计划在任期的最后几天推动社会保障改革的“伟大想法”
text: As Social Security faces an imminent funding shortfall, Sen. Bill Cassidy said he has come up with a plan to invest in the stock market on the program's behalf.
zh: 由于社会保障面临迫在眉睫的资金短缺，参议员比尔·卡西迪表示，他已提出代表该计划投资股市的计划。

title: Trump administration to loan $17 billion to speed deployment of 10 big nuclear reactors in U.S.
title_zh: 特朗普政府将贷款170亿美元加速美国10座大型核反应堆的部署
text: The loans will support the construction of five projects that each host two big nuclear reactors.
zh: 这些贷款将支持五个项目的建设，每个项目都有两个大型核反应堆。

title: Progressive Brad Lander’s surging bid for Congress splinters Democrats' labor union alliance
title_zh: 进步派布拉德·兰德(Brad Lander)大幅竞选国会议员导致民主党工会联盟分裂
text: Rep. Dan Goldman, D-N.Y., is fighting for his political life in a race with Brad Lander, who is backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani and Sen. Bernie Sanders, I-Vt.
zh: 纽约州民主党众议员丹·戈德曼 (Dan Goldman) 正在与布拉德·兰德 (Brad Lander) 争夺政治生命，后者得到了市长佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 和佛蒙特州参议员伯尼·桑德斯 (Bernie Sanders) 的支持。

title: Gold and silver tumble as rate-hike fears hit precious metals
title_zh: 由于加息担忧打击贵金属，黄金和白银暴跌
text: Gold and silver fell Tuesday as rate-hike fears pressured precious metals and Wall Street banks reassessed their gold forecasts.
zh: 由于加息担忧令贵金属承压且华尔街银行重新评估了黄金预测，黄金和白银周二下跌。

title: We're adding to our position in an industrial giant with a major catalyst nearing
title_zh: 我们正在巩固我们在工业巨头中的地位，主要催化剂即将到来
text: We want to own more of the stock ahead of its long-awaited breakup.
zh: 我们希望在期待已久的分拆之前持有更多股票。

title: Highly successful people do 5 things to get luckier in life, says Stanford leadership expert: 'Good luck isn't random or rare'
title_zh: 斯坦福大学领导力专家表示，非常成功的人会做五件事来让生活变得更幸运：“好运不是随机的或罕见的”
text: Stanford University educator Tina Seelig shares what the luckiest people do every day to find success.
zh: 斯坦福大学教育家蒂娜·西利格 (Tina Seelig) 分享了最幸运的人每天为获得成功所做的事情。

title: SpaceX succumbs to gravity as the stock briefly dips below its debut price on Nasdaq
title_zh: SpaceX 屈服于重力，股价短暂跌破纳斯达克上市价格
text: The stock hit a new low before recovering to trade in positive territory.
zh: 该股触及新低，然后恢复上涨。

title: Social Security urgently needs another ‘Greenspan Commission’ to save it
title_zh: 社会保障急需另一个“格林斯潘委员会”来拯救
text: The former Federal Reserve chairman’s most important achievement is often overlooked
zh: 这位前美联储主席最重要的成就常常被忽视

title: ‘Money can make you happy’: My wife and I have no heirs, but we’re making the world a better place by giving it away
title_zh: “金钱可以让你快乐”：我和妻子没有继承人，但我们通过捐赠金钱让世界变得更美好
text: “If you find a need in your community, there’s likely an organization that will help you get involved.”
zh: “如果您发现社区有需求，很可能会有一个组织帮助您参与其中。”

title: These stocks are falling the most on Tuesday as the tech sector comes under pressure
title_zh: 由于科技板块面临压力，这些股票周二跌幅最大
text: Most of the day’s biggest losers are still up tremendously for 2026.
zh: 当天大部分跌幅最大的股票在 2026 年仍大幅上涨。

title: At school, it’s cheating. At work, it’s essential. New grads are caught in a double standard around AI.
title_zh: 在学校，这是作弊。在工作中，这是必不可少的。新毕业生在人工智能方面陷入了双重标准。
text: Mixed messages on AI are another challenge when Gen Z already faces a tough job market.
zh: 当 Z 世代已经面临艰难的就业市场时，关于人工智能的混杂信息是另一个挑战。

title: Why a 30-year mortgage loan could be your biggest money mistake
title_zh: 为什么 30 年期抵押贷款可能是您最大的金钱错误
text: You might be able to save hundreds of thousands of dollars with a 15-year mortgage loan.
zh: 通过 15 年期抵押贷款，您也许可以节省数十万美元。

title: Micron and Sandisk lead a sharp tech selloff in a ‘gut-check’ moment for AI stocks
title_zh: 美光和闪迪在人工智能股票的“肠道检查”时刻引领科技股大幅抛售
text: Investors are taking a ‘breather’ from AI-driven momentum, an analyst says
zh: 分析师表示，投资者正在从人工智能驱动的势头中“喘口气”

title: Economy gets boost from World Cup and peace talks with Iran, but it’s not past the danger point
title_zh: 世界杯和与伊朗的和谈推动经济增长，但尚未摆脱危险点
text: The U.S. economy got some relief in June from declining oil prices and the start of the 2026 World Cup, but it’s still feeling the strain from the conflict with Iran.
zh: 6 月份，美国经济因油价下跌和 2026 年世界杯开幕而有所缓解，但仍感受到与伊朗冲突的压力。

title: SpaceX stock falls below $150 debut price, sending market cap under $2 trillion
title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破 150 美元首发价，市值跌破 2 万亿美元
text: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.
zh: 这家太空和人工智能公司在破纪录的首次公开募股(IPO)后最初飙升，但其涨幅已有所回落。

title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
title_zh: 扎克伯格不断推动可穿戴设备，Meta 宣布新款智能眼镜起价 299 美元
text: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.
zh: Meta 高管表示，他们认为这款轻型智能眼镜是迈向更先进设备（镜片中带有屏幕）的一步。

title: Sens. Warren, Kelly press Trump administration on effects of tariffs on manufacturing
title_zh: 参议员沃伦和凯利就关税对制造业的影响向特朗普政府施压
text: A pair of Democratic senators is asking for answers from the Trump administration on the effect of tariffs on U.S. manufacturing.
zh: 两位民主党参议员正在要求特朗普政府就关税对美国制造业的影响给出答案。

title: Google’s online dominance is showing signs of cracking in AI era
title_zh: 谷歌的在线统治地位在人工智能时代出现破裂迹象
text: While Google remains in a position of strength in the eyes of Wall Street, the AI era is complicating the company's story.
zh: 尽管谷歌在华尔街眼中仍然处于强势地位，但人工智能时代使该公司的故事变得更加复杂。

title: AI memory startup focused on cutting token costs raises $98 million
title_zh: 专注于削减代币成本的 AI 内存初创公司筹集了 9800 万美元
text: Engram enters the market as the AI industry grapples with a rising cost problem fueled by more expensive models.
zh: Engram 进入市场之际，人工智能行业正在努力应对模型更昂贵导致的成本上升问题。

title: Trump Account signups now total more than 6 million, but millions more children are eligible
title_zh: 特朗普账户注册人数现已超过 600 万，但还有数百万儿童符合资格
text: Trump Accounts will soon be available to millions of U.S. children; however, many may miss out on the savings opportunity — and free money.
zh: 特朗普账户很快将向数百万美国儿童开放；然而，许多人可能会错过储蓄机会和免费资金。

title: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
title_zh: 首席运营官马克·温特霍夫 (Marc Winterhoff) 离职，Lucid 将裁员约 18% 的美国员工
text: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.
zh: 作为成本节约计划的一部分，Lucid Group 将在美国裁员 18%。它还表示，首席运营官马克·温特霍夫(Marc Winterhoff)将立即离职。

title: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
title_zh: 俱乐部周二股市最值得关注的十大事件
text: The Nasdaq is set for a sharply lower open, as the plunge in South Korean stocks bleeds into the U.S.
zh: 随着韩国股市暴跌蔓延至美国，纳斯达克指数预计大幅低开。

title: 'Reward for failure': Investor support for Target Chair Brian Cornell falls to lowest level ever
title_zh: “失败的奖励”：投资者对塔吉特董事长布莱恩·康奈尔的支持降至有史以来的最低水平
text: Target Chair Brian Cornell built the retailer into a $100 billion-plus giant, but recent struggles and underperformance have fueled investor calls for change.
zh: Target 董事长布莱恩·康奈尔 (Brian Cornell) 将这家零售商打造成价值超过 1000 亿美元的巨头，但最近的困境和业绩不佳引发了投资者要求变革的呼声。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
text: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。
